body:
**Galaxy's Mod Is a mod that adds my favorite stuff from games.** 

## Coming soon 
- Galaxy block 
- Galaxy weapons and tools
- Galaxy dimension 
- Galaxy food
### Added 
- Undertale music - By Toby fox
- Deltarune music - By Toby fox
- Snow stairs and slab

### Legal & Credits 
All versions of this mod contain music by Toby Fox. I do not own the music; it is used under fan-content spirit. The code for all versions is licensed under MIT
